prompt: Create a ledger voucher dated today. Debit account 6340 (Telefon) with 8500 NOK and credit account 1920 (Bankinnskudd) with 8500 NOK. Description: "Telefonregning mars 2026".
notes: DIAGNOSTIC: Tests POST /ledger/voucher with JSON body (not params). The exact failure mode from Day2_Attempt9. If agent sends as params -> 422. Must use body with balanced postings (debit positive, credit negative).
